description: A Class A artifact whose observed_digest does not match expected_digest under the declared canonicalization MUST receive TAMPERED status.

input.claim: this artifact matches its declared origin digest

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 §3 Class A: when canonicalized bytes do NOT reproduce the declared digest, status MUST be TAMPERED. Exercises invariants A1 (deterministic reproduction) and A3 (verification operates on canonicalized bytes only).
